company.name: ScaleOps
company.notes: DevOps with Senior Creative & Motion Designer role.

research.status_summary: Actively hiring and in high-growth mode following a $130M Series C raise in March 2026 at an $800M+ valuation, with plans to triple headcount by year-end.
research.hiring_policy: Headquartered in Tel Aviv (Israel R&D) and New York, with ~40% of open roles listed as remote-friendly; no public EOR or visa sponsorship policy found, and Israel-local roles are the primary target for the Senior Creative & Motion Designer position.
recent_news: March 30, 2026: Closed $130M Series C led by Insight Partners at $800M+ valuation, bringing total funding to $210M; round included a secondary transaction worth tens of millions for employees.
2026 headcount tripled YoY to 120+ employees across Israel, North America, and Europe, with a stated goal to triple again by end of 2026.
Platform expanded to self-hosted GenAI models and GPU-based applications in late 2025, now serving Adobe, Wiz, DocuSign, Salesforce, and Coupa; 350%+ YoY revenue growth reported.
research.growth_signal: Explosive growth trajectory: $210M total raised, 350% YoY growth, 52 open roles currently listed, and an explicit plan to 3x its 120-person team before end of 2026.
research.fit_for_lior: A pure DevOps/cloud-infra B2B company with no product, AI-creative, or consumer-facing design surface — the Senior Creative & Motion Designer role would be an isolated brand/marketing seat with minimal overlap with Lior's Creative AI, Product Analyst, or Vibe Coder threads.
